sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 9:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 9:1
items.html: The screen in each degree measures and makes a “boundary” over the degree at the level of reflected light that the screen raises according to its coarseness (Item 2 above), since the screen of phase three limits the level of the degree so that it does not acquire the light of Keter, and the screen of phase two limits it from light of Hochma, too, etc.
